item.title: Nostalgia: The Life of a Builder
item.description: A look back at the challenges, triumphs, and memories that define the builder’s journey. What’s the most nostalgic moment from your building days?

media:content.media:title: Nostalgia: The Life of a Builder
media:content.media:description: A look back at the challenges, triumphs, and memories that define the builder’s journey. What’s the most nostalgic moment from your building days?

item.title: Building a House: EP 11 — The Exterior Trim!
item.description: Details make the difference. Episode 11 focuses on exterior trim, adding polish and character to the build. What trim style do you think elevates a home’s look the most?

media:content.media:title: Building a House: EP 11 — The Exterior Trim!
media:content.media:description: Details make the difference. Episode 11 focuses on exterior trim, adding polish and character to the build. What trim style do you think elevates a home’s look the most?

item.title: Episode 17: Building a Dream Home
item.description: The journey continues — Episode 17 captures another milestone in building the dream home. Which part of the process feels most rewarding to you?

media:content.media:description: The journey continues — Episode 17 captures another milestone in building the dream home. Which part of the process feels most rewarding to you?

item.title: How to Start Off as a Builder | Advice
item.description: Starting out in construction? This clip shares practical advice for new builders stepping into the trade. What’s the best tip you’d give a beginner?

media:content.media:title: How to Start Off as a Builder | Advice
media:content.media:description: Starting out in construction? This clip shares practical advice for new builders stepping into the trade. What’s the best tip you’d give a beginner?

item.title: Tips & Tricks for Fitting Doors the RIGHT Way
item.description: Precision matters — here are the smart methods to fit doors properly and avoid costly mistakes. What’s your go‑to trick for perfect door alignment?

media:content.media:description: Precision matters — here are the smart methods to fit doors properly and avoid costly mistakes. What’s your go‑to trick for perfect door alignment?

item.title: Hand Tools That Are ESSENTIAL for Your Truck!
item.description: From wrenches to hammers, these hand tools are must‑haves for every truck setup. Which tool do you never leave behind?

item.title: Big Day on the Farmhouse Project!
item.description: Progress takes a leap forward as the farmhouse project hits a major milestone. What’s the most exciting stage of a home build for you?

item.title: Digging Foundations (Farmhouse Day 1)
item.description: Day one of the farmhouse build begins with digging foundations — the critical step that sets the stage for everything to come. Watch as the groundwork takes shape for a dream home.

media:content.media:description: Day one of the farmhouse build begins with digging foundations — the critical step that sets the stage for everything to come. Watch as the groundwork takes shape for a dream home.

item.title: Your Builder Fears — We Name Them All!
item.description: Every builder has fears — from hidden cracks to costly mistakes. This video lays them all out, exposing the challenges and worries that come with construction.

media:content.media:title: Your Builder Fears — We Name Them All!
media:content.media:description: Every builder has fears — from hidden cracks to costly mistakes. This video lays them all out, exposing the challenges and worries that come with construction.

item.title: Easy & Effective Method to Strong Stair Building
item.description: Strong stairs don’t just happen — they’re built with the right method. This clip shows a simple yet effective approach to stair construction that ensures safety and durability.

media:content.media:title: Easy & Effective Method to Strong Stair Building
media:content.media:description: Strong stairs don’t just happen — they’re built with the right method. This clip shows a simple yet effective approach to stair construction that ensures safety and durability.

item.title: Overhang Outriggers for Home Sophistication

item.title: A centuries-old home gets a stunning makeover
item.description: What does it take to breathe new life into a centuries-old home? This stunning before-and-after transformation tells the whole story.
